properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Oh, my soul, Oh, how you worry Oh, how you're weary from fearing you lost control This was the one thing, you didn't see coming And no one would blame you though If cried in private If tried to hide it away so no one knows no will see if you stop believing

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh, my soul You are not alone There's a place where fear has to face the God you know One more day, He will make a way Let him show you how, you can lay this down 'Cause you're not alone

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Here and now You can be honest I won't try to promise that someday it all works out 'Cause this is the valley And even now, He is breathing on your dry bones And there will dancing There will be beauty where beauty was ash and stone This much I know

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Oh, my soul, You are not alone There's a place where fear has to face the God you know One more day, He will make a way Let him show you how, you can lay this down

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I'm not strong enough, I can't take anymore (You can lay it down, you can lay down) And my shipwrecked faith will never get me to shore (You can lay it down, you can lay it down) Can He find me here Can He keep mo from going under

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Oh, my soul, You are not alone There's a place where fear has to face the God you know One more day, He will make a way Let him show you how you can lay this down 'Cause you're not alone Oh, my soul you're not alone
